$comment: schema_version=1.3.0 | Updated 2026-06-03 | Scheduler Layer: added TASK_PRIORITY_SET, TASK_PRIORITY_CLEARED + fields priority_weight, execution_cost, reason. Breaking changes require engine_version bump + Architect RFC.
title: NOVA 2.5 Task Event
description: Schema for a single line in TASK_EVENTS.jsonl. Every state change in the system is represented as one of these events. The log is append-only; no event may ever be edited or deleted.

event_index.description: Monotonically increasing integer. Index 0 is reserved for ENGINE_INITIALIZED. A gap in indices is a hard error.

event_type.description: Type of event. Must match a transition defined in transitions.yaml or be a system/agent meta-event. SNAPSHOT_CREATED records a snapshot. AGENT_REGISTERED records a new agent joining the runtime. TASK_RELEASED / LEASE_RENEWED / LEASE_EXPIRED are Agent Runtime lease events. TASK_PRIORITY_SET / TASK_PRIORITY_CLEARED are Scheduler Layer events.

engine_version.description: Must match transitions.yaml engine_version at the time the event was written. Replay with a mismatched engine_version is undefined behaviour.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp. INJECTED by CI — never read from the local system clock. Used as the authoritative clock for TTL and expiry calculations.

prev_event_hash.description: The event_hash of the immediately preceding event. The genesis event (index 0) uses the literal string GENESIS.

event_hash.description: SHA-256 of: JSON.stringify(sortedKeys(event_minus_event_hash_minus_prev_event_hash)) + prev_event_hash_value. Verified algorithm: sha256(canonicalCore + prevHashString) where canonicalCore = JSON.stringify with top-level keys sorted lexicographically, event_hash and prev_event_hash both excluded from the input object.

task_id.description: Task this event applies to. Null only for system meta-events (ENGINE_INITIALIZED, PROJECTION_REBUILT).

agent.description: Unique identifier of the agent that triggered this event. Null for system-generated events.

role.description: Role the agent was acting in. 'system' for automated TTL expiry events.

model.description: LLM model name. Null for system events.

branch.description: Feature branch name. Present on TASK_CLAIMED events for IMPLEMENTATION/REFACTOR roles.

pr_number.description: GitHub PR number. Present when a PR exists for this event.

forked_from.description: On TASK_FORKED events: the EXPIRED parent task ID that this fork was created from.

fork_suffix.description: On TASK_FORKED events: the single lowercase letter suffix assigned to the new task. Computed by canonical fork function — never assigned manually.

override_reason.description: On TASK_ARCHITECT_OVERRIDE events: mandatory documented reason for the override.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes. For PROJECTION_REBUILT: lists event_count consumed. For SNAPSHOT_CREATED: 'event_count=N genesis_hash=<hex>'.

snapshot_index.description: On SNAPSHOT_CREATED events: the index N of the produced file at .task-locks/snapshots/snapshot_N.json. Null on all other event types.

priority_weight.description: On TASK_PRIORITY_SET: the scheduler priority weight for this task. Higher = scheduled sooner. Default (absent/null) = 1.0. Null on all other event types.

execution_cost.description: On TASK_PRIORITY_SET: relative execution complexity on Fibonacci scale (1=trivial, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, 21=epic). Divides the scheduler score so small work is preferred. Default (absent/null) = 1. Null on all other event types.

reason.description: On TASK_PRIORITY_SET and TASK_PRIORITY_CLEARED: human-readable justification for the priority change. Optional but strongly recommended.

idea_id.description: Idea Factory identifier. Ideas compile into architectures; architectures compile into task graphs.

content.description: Free text idea content for IDEA_SUBMITTED.

architecture.description: Structured architecture artifact generated by the compiler. Advisory until task graph events are written.

task_graph.description: DAG task graph emitted by the architecture compiler.

description.description: Human-readable task description generated from architecture.

module.description: Architecture module that owns the generated task.

bid_strength.description: Agent bid strength, used as a market signal only.

cost_offer.description: Agent cost offer for a task bid.

confidence.description: Agent confidence for a bid or generated architecture.

winning_bid_id.description: Winning bid signal. Not an assignment until bridge and lease commit.

price_multiplier.description: Discovered market pressure multiplier per task.

allOf.description: ENGINE_INITIALIZED: system meta-event, no task context.
TASK_CLAIMED: agent, role, model, branch all required.
TASK_REVIEW_REQUESTED / TASK_REFACTOR_REQUESTED / TASK_REFACTOR_COMPLETE: agent and role required.
TASK_APPROVED / TASK_REJECTED: review or architect agent required.
TASK_FORKED: forked_from and fork_suffix are mandatory.
PROJECTION_REBUILT: system meta-event, no task context.

SNAPSHOT_CREATED: system meta-event recording a new registry snapshot. snapshot_index is mandatory. genesis_hash = SHA-256(sortedKeys(genesis.json)) = 1eb7528ebb64a57fb9b8b567bc9b613911aa3c213e7aaf731ce3fbdc77584eb1. notes must contain 'event_count=N genesis_hash=<hex>'.

AGENT_REGISTERED: records a new agent joining the runtime. agent is mandatory (the registering agent id). notes must contain capability list, e.g. 'capabilities=[IMPLEMENTATION,REFACTOR]'. task_id is null — registration is system-scoped.
TASK_RELEASED: agent voluntarily releases their active lease on a task before expiry. task_id, agent, and role are required.
LEASE_RENEWED: agent extends their active lease (heartbeat with lease extension). task_id, agent, and role are required. notes should contain 'lease_until=ISO'.

LEASE_EXPIRED: system marks an agent lease as expired after missed heartbeat deadline. System-generated; agent is null, role is 'system'. Parallel to TASK_LOCK_EXPIRED but for the Agent Runtime lease layer.
TASK_PRIORITY_SET: Architect declares or updates priority_weight and execution_cost for a task. Both fields are required and non-null. execution_cost must be a Fibonacci value (1,2,3,5,8,13,21).

TASK_PRIORITY_CLEARED: removes any priority override for a task, resetting to scheduler defaults (priority_weight=1.0, execution_cost=1). priority_weight and execution_cost must be null on this event.
